response.justification: The candidate has extensive software engineering experience (15+ years) but lacks clear, demonstrated AI expertise (e.g., AI-powered products, ML models, or AI strategy). Their work in AI-agent infrastructure is promising but tangential to the role's core requirements. Strong technical depth in software and cloud technologies, but insufficient evidence of strategic AI leadership or innovation.
strengths: 15+ years of software engineering experience across diverse domains
Experience with cloud-native development, CI/CD, and modern stack (TypeScript, Node.js, Kubernetes)
Entrepreneurial experience (GISCollective, Altom Consulting) demonstrating initiative and leadership
concerns: Limited visible AI expertise or strategic AI product development
No advanced degrees (Master's/PhD) in AI-related fields
Current role (re:cinq) focuses on AI-agent infrastructure rather than AI product strategy

key_factors.factor: AI expertise and strategic product experience
